text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 95 

PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_DND_IND 

LABEL: Medicaid or CHIP Enrollment Denied Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the provider’s Medicaid and/or CHIP enrollment status is one of the values for a denied 
enrollment status; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_DND_IND 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_DND_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
